title: desmanthus covillei
intro: Desmanthus covillei, also known as Coyote Brush or Purple Coyote Brush, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Desmanthus covillei has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
